ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlDanial/cloc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlDanial/cloc
Language: perl
cloc counts blank lines, comment lines, and physical lines of source code in many programming languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Difegue/LANraragi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Difegue/LANraragi
Language: perl
Web application for archival and reading of manga/doujinshi. Lightweight and Docker-ready for NAS/servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenKore/openkore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenKore/openkore

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ddclient/ddclient
Language: perl
ddclient updates dynamic DNS entries for accounts on a wide range of dynamic DNS services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: inverse-inc/packetfence
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/inverse-inc/packetfence
Language: perl
PacketFence is a fully supported, trusted, Free and Open Source network access control (NAC) solution. Boasting an impressive feature set including a captive-portal for registration and remediation, centralized wired and wireless management, powerful BYOD management options, 802.1X support, layer-2 isolation of problematic devices; PacketFence c…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: linux-test-project/lcov
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/linux-test-project/lcov
Language: perl
LCOV

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdisco/netdisco
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdisco/netdisco
Language: perl
A web-based network management tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ocpi/ocpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ocpi/ocpi
Language: perl
The Open Charge Point Interface (OCPI) allows for a scalable, automated roaming setup between Charge Point Operators and e-Mobility Service Providers. It supports authorisation, charge point information exchange (incl transaction events), charge detail record exchange and finally, the exchange of smart-charging commands between parties.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trinityrnaseq/trinityrnaseq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trinityrnaseq/trinityrnaseq
Language: perl

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tseemann/prokka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tseemann/prokka
Language: perl

ns0:entry.ns0:title: znuny/Znuny
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/znuny/Znuny
Language: perl
Znuny is a free, open-source, and versatile web-based ticketing system for Customer Service, Help Desk, IT Service Management, and more. It is built for transparency and long-term sustainability and is highly tailorable to your organization's needs.
